questionHtml:
What are the products of the reaction between sulfuric acid and sodium hydrogen carbonate?

A.     NaSO4 + H2O + CO2

B.     Na2SO4 + CO2

C.     Na2SO4 + H2O + CO2

D.     NaSO4 + H2CO3

meta.title: What are the products of the reaction between sulfuric acid and sodium hydrogen carbonate? A. NaSO4 + H2O + CO2 B. Na2SO4 + CO2 C. Na2SO4 + H2O + CO2 D. NaSO4 + H2CO3
